title: I Tried the Open Source ElevenLabs Alternative (Voicebox)
summary: Voicebox is a free open-source local AI voice studio for developers that provides voice cloning, text-to-speech, system-wide dictation, agent voice output, MCP integration, and a local REST API. The Better Stack team tested it as a privacy-first alternative to cloud-based services like ElevenLabs.
writeup: Better Stack tests Voicebox, a free open-source AI voice studio that runs locally rather than through cloud services like ElevenLabs. The tool covers voice cloning, text-to-speech, system-wide dictation, agent voice output, and MCP integration, with the local-first design positioned as a privacy-focused approach that avoids per-generation limits. The takeaway: a single self-hosted studio handles both creative voice generation and developer integrations without sending audio to external providers.
